overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long CAT Daily ETF (CATG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) stock, less fees, and expenses CATG was launched on May 12, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
